betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Smoker Block§f

§aGenerate configurable smoke for decorative or industrial purposes!§f
The §bSmoker§f is a special block that produces smoke independently without needing a connected heat source. Its parameters are fully configurable through its GUI.

§6Key Features§f:
§b• GUI Configuration§f: Open the Smoker's interface to customize smoke color, amount, intensity, and particle scale.
§b• Independent Operation§f: Does not require a connected chimney or heat source.
§b• Color Control§f: Set custom smoke colors using ARGB hex values.
§b• Particle Control§f: Adjust particle count (up to §e16 per chimney§f) and blow-out distance (up to §e4 blocks§f).

§6Smoke Behavior§f:
§b• Collision§f: Smoke particles collide with obstacles, flowing around walls and ceilings.
§b• Coloring§f: Smoke has a §e10% chance§f of being tinted by the chimney material it passes through.
§b• Emitters§f: All smoke emitters can produce smoke even without connected chimneys (configurable).

§eTip§f: Use the Smoker to create atmospheric effects in bases, factories, or as visual indicators for machine operation.
